hide-custom.name: Hide Custom Gamemodes
hide-custom.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>: Hides the icon kit buttons for the custom gamemodes.
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>: En el Icon Kit, oculta los botones de los gamemodes personalizados.

keybind-comic-next-page.name: Next Page (Comics)
keybind-comic-next-page.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>: The keybind to move to the next page in the comics.
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>: La combinacion de teclas para mover a la pagina siguiente en los comics.

keybind-comic-prev-page.name: Previous Page (Comics)
keybind-comic-prev-page.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>: The keybind to move to the previous page in the comics.
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>: La combinacion de teclas para mover a la pagina anterior en los comics.

dev-mode.name: Developer Mode
dev-mode.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>: Enabling this mode allows you to bypass most restrictions (like access to the online menu).
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>: Habilitando este modo te deja sobrepasar la mayoria de las restricciones (como acceder al menu online).

bypass-levels.name: Level Bypass
bypass-levels.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>: Unlocks all levels, completing one like this will break the progression system.
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>: Desbloquea todos los niveles, completando uno asi rompera el sistema de progreso.

bypass-vaults.name: Vault Bypass
bypass-vaults.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>: Unlocks the vaults, skipping the requirements needed to unlock them.
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>: Desbloquea los vaults, saltandose los requerimientos necesarios para abrirlos.

empty-levels.name: Empty all levels
empty-levels.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>: Turns all levels of the mod as empty templates, just to test the achievements and progression system.
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>: Convierte todos los niveles del mod en una base vacia, solo para testear los logros y sistema de progreso.

danger-title.name: Danger Zone
danger-title.description:
<cy>**ENGLISH**</c>:
The following setting is if you want to <cr>delete your save data</c> of Geometry Dash Odyssey, only confirm if you 100% want a full restart of the fangame.
***
<cy>**SPANISH**</c>:
El siguiente setting es si deseas <cr>borrar los datos</c> de Geometry Dash Odyssey, solamente confirma si estas 100% en querer un reinicio total del fangame.
